Levels.A: This is a trial pitting a rewarded A scene against a neutral A scene
Levels.B: This is a trial pitting a rewarded B scene against a neutral B scene

Levels.nonviolation: The scenes displayed belong to nonviolation condition pairmates
Levels.violation: The scenes displayed belongs violation condition pairmates

response_accuracy.Description: A participant's response is scored for accuracy. If no response was made, the value is NaN

response_time.Description: Reaction time. Time in seconds for participant to make a response since stimulus onset
